overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player moves through commercial streets, underpasses, and alleys with dense holographic advertisements and futuristic architecture, encountering pedestrians and a passing police car.

events.description: police car drives past from right to left, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a commercial street lined with neon signs and storefronts

notable_agents.action: police car driving past the player from right to left with flashing lights

entered.detail: large blue neon sign reading 'DATA INC' mounted on building facade
tall building covered with red and blue neon signage
futuristic vehicles parked along the curb
multi-story buildings with illuminated windows and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-lit cyberpunk street at night. The player walks forward past parked cars and commercial buildings, with a prominent blue 'DATA INC' sign visible ahead. A police car drives past from right to left, briefly dominating the frame before the player continues toward an underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with food vendors

events.description: enters covered area beneath elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past food stalls and vending machines

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway casting shadows over the walkway
illuminated food cart with green neon lighting under the overpass
futuristic vending machine with glowing interface
large horizontal digital screen displaying 'PASSION' advertisement with female figure

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway. The lighting shifts to artificial sources from food stalls and vending machines. Large digital billboards displaying 'PASSION' advertisements line the right wall while the concrete overpass structure dominates overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with digital advertising and stairway entrance

events.description: approaches and begins ascending concrete stairs with orange railings

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and approaching stairs leading to an upper level

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with bright orange handrails leading upward
bright orange safety railings along the stairway

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk, the player passes vending machines and moves toward a stairway. The digital billboards recede into the distance as the player approaches and begins ascending the concrete stairs with distinctive orange railings, transitioning to an upper walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated alleyway with graffiti walls and neon advertisements

events.description: finishes ascending stairs and continues forward on elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: following an NPC with a glowing orange hat through a narrow alleyway

notable_agents.action: character wearing a jacket with yellow stripes and a glowing orange wide-brimmed hat walking ahead of the player

entered.detail: large blue billboard with 'CIRKUS' text and red star logo mounted on building
concrete wall covered with colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the stairs and enters a narrow elevated alleyway. A prominent 'CIRKUS' billboard dominates the right side while graffiti covers the left wall. The player follows an NPC wearing a distinctive glowing orange hat through the corridor, moving toward an open area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with prominent nightclub signage

events.description: exits narrow alley into open urban intersection with tall buildings
crosses the street at intersection, avoiding vehicles

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while navigating around pedestrians and observing the surroundings

entered.detail: large orange neon sign reading 'CALIENTE' on building facade
wide street intersection with crosswalks and tall buildings on all sides
skyscrapers with illuminated windows towering above the street level

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the player enters a wide open intersection dominated by a bright orange 'CALIENTE' neon sign. The space opens up to reveal towering glass skyscrapers in the background. The player crosses the street, navigating through scattered pedestrians while futuristic vehicles pass by in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense nightclub district with heavy neon signage

events.description: approaches corner with prominent 'Jacked and Coke' neon sign and group of gathered NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking through a densely lit street with heavy neon advertising, approaching a corner with gathered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs standing and conversing on the street corner near the railing

entered.detail: purple neon sign for 'Riot' club on building facade
pink and purple neon sign reading 'JACKED AND COKE' mounted on building corner
floating holographic advertisements projecting above the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a densely packed nightclub district with intense neon lighting. The player passes the 'Riot' club and approaches a corner dominated by a 'JACKED AND COKE' neon sign. Holographic advertisements float in the air, and a group of NPCs stands conversing on the corner as the player continues down the neon-saturated street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched metropolis, moving from a commercial street into a claustrophobic alleyway before emerging into a sprawling nightclub district. It begins on a rain-slicked street past parked cars and a blue DATA INC sign, briefly interrupted by a passing police car before the camera glides into a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway. As the player passes vending machines and PASSION billboards, the scene shifts upward via a concrete stairway with orange railings, leading into a narrow elevated alleyway where graffiti-covered walls and a CIRKUS billboard frame the path. The environment then opens abruptly into a wide intersection dominated by a bright orange CALIENTE sign and towering glass skyscrapers, before finally weaving through a densely packed district of holographic advertisements and neon-saturated clubs like Riot and Jacked and Coke.
